description: Use this API to define a zone subsystem. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ierr = zsys(sid, num, zones)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Valid zone subsystem id. valid zone subsystem ids range from 0 to 11. (input).

parameters.name: zones
parameters.description: An array of NUM elements specifying array that contains the zones to set. (input).
